entities.name: HOLOTRICHIA REYNAUDI
entities.description: A scarab beetle and agricultural pest native to southern India.

entities.name: SOUTHERN INDIA
entities.description: The native region of the scarab beetle Holotrichia reynaudi.

entities.name: SEX PHEROMONE
entities.description: A chemical signal used by insects to attract mates.

entities.name: GAS CHROMATOGRAPHY–MASS SPECTROMETRY
entities.description: An analytical method used to identify the chemical components of the pheromone.

entities.name: HEXANE
entities.description: A solvent used for the extraction of pheromones from abdominal glands.

entities.name: INDOLE
entities.description: A chemical compound tested as a candidate for the sex pheromone of Holotrichia reynaudi.

entities.name: PHENOL
entities.description: A chemical compound tested as a candidate for the sex pheromone of Holotrichia reynaudi.

entities.name: ANISOLE
entities.description: The major component of the sex pheromone for both Holotrichia reynaudi and Holotrichia consanguinea.

entities.name: HOLOTRICHIA CONSANGUINEA
entities.description: A melolonthine scarab that shares the same sex pheromone as Holotrichia reynaudi.

entities.name: MELOLONTHINE SCARABS
entities.description: A group of scarab beetles to which H. reynaudi and H. consanguinea belong.
